t4_day_selection.rule: world.crn.pick_weighted over the persona's observed weekday daynums, weighted by day weight

t5_superset_note: T5 = T4 + remaining diary; the stated-claims block renders ALL A3.1 items (typical mode, telework, residence importance added), a strict superset of the M2 bundle's self-report block — required by A4.1 nesting (T3 must be contained in T4 and T5)

ess_protocol_pins.units: equivalent sample size (Gao, Han & Liang 2026, arXiv 2601.12343)
ess_protocol_pins.flexible_baseline: the E1 MNL falsification arm's day-structure + mode-choice model, trained on n real diary records under the A2.1 fold structure
ess_protocol_pins.cv_protocol: A2.1 five household-atomic folds, pooled out-of-fold, ensemble N >= 20
ess_protocol_pins.headline_discipline: T5 is the SOLE headline; T1-T4 are the diagnostic information-value curve

ess_loss_adapter.pinned: 2026-07-20, before any ESS quantity is computed (A4.1 pin-before-scoring)
ess_loss_adapter.observation: one persona (all 11,940 carry >=1 observed weighted weekday slot)
ess_loss_adapter.target_primary: target-ALL: the persona's observed weekday family distributions over ALL their E1 day slots - trips/day bins (day-weighted, n_collapsed, zero-trip days in bin 0), five-mode shares (w_trip-weighted), depart bands (w_trip-weighted); identical across tiers by construction. CAVEAT stated now: T4/T4-noclaims/T5 (and the deployed/template arms) carry some or all of these days IN EVIDENCE, so their ESS on this target reads as evidence-compression value, exactly the A4.1 framing ('trained on ESS(k) real diary records')
ess_loss_adapter.target_heldout: target-HELDOUT (secondary): multi-day personas only (2,975); the same family distributions over the persona's slots EXCLUDING the manifest-pinned T4 selected_daynum. For T1-T3 all target days are outside evidence; for T4/T4-noclaims this is a TRUE generalization read (evidence = the one shown day only); for T5/deployed/template the target remains in evidence and is flagged as such
ess_loss_adapter.loss: unweighted mean over the persona's DEFINED families of TVD(predicted, observed); a family is undefined (excluded) when the persona's observed trip mass is zero (zero-trip-only personas: trips family only)
ess_loss_adapter.predicted_distribution: normalize(mean over M ensemble members of the persona's unnormalized family masses) - ratio-of-means, simulated day trips carry day_weight (D5)
ess_loss_adapter.card_arms_protocol: M = 20 CRN members, namespaces e7ess_{arm}_run{k}, agents.card_executor.execute_days(update_habits=False) on the E1 day slots
ess_loss_adapter.baseline_protocol: block-out CV per evaluation/ess.py (Gao-Han-Liang, exactly as published): household-atomic training blocks via ess.household_blocks(namespace='e7ess_v1'); per block the E1 MNL arm's two components are REFIT on the block only (day-signature + depart-band distributions from block person-days/trips with within-block cell->pooled->global fallback, logit_chooser.fit iters=250 on block GOLDEN records; a component with zero block mass falls back to uniform-over-feasible / uniform-over-bands, reported); the test persona's OWN GOLDEN evidence supplies features exactly as in the E1 arm; prediction through the SAME RealizedDay Monte-Carlo path with matched M = 20 members (namespaces e7ess_base_N{size}_b{block}_run{k}) so the MC-TVD inflation is symmetric across arms and first-order cancels in the difference loss
ess_loss_adapter.block_fill_adaptation: household atomicity makes each block overshoot the nominal N by a partial household, so the discarded tail is O(B) persons and the last blocks of the nominal floor(n/N) may go unfilled; only FULLY-FILLED blocks participate (>=2 required) and the realized block count and sizes are reported per size
ess_loss_adapter.template_vs_llm_headtohead: paired per persona on the 8,496 personas whose deployed card is card_source=llm: delta_i = loss(llm card_i) - loss(template card_i), household-atomic bootstrap 95% CI on the mean, both targets; group means reported alongside
ess_loss_adapter.top_rung_discipline: the T4->T5 increment is read on the multi-day subpopulation only (A4.1(c)); single-day personas have T4 = T5 by construction
ess_loss_adapter.aggregate_diagnostic: per-arm pooled E1 TVD (sealed A2.1 protocol, ensemble 20) reported alongside as the ordinary-day aggregate curve
